flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Florida Memorial University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.8k → $20.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Florida Memorial University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.8k → $20.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Florida Memorial University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Florida Memorial University rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (945 → 1.2k).
